issue.message: Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)
A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.4
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.security:security-crypto than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.0
A newer version of com.github.mwiede:jsch than 0.2.21 is available: 2.27.8
A newer version of com.google.api-client:google-api-client-android than 2.2.0 is available: 2.9.0
A newer version of com.google.api-client:google-api-client-gson than 2.2.0 is available: 2.9.0
A newer version of com.google.http-client:google-http-client-android than 1.43.3 is available: 2.1.0
A newer version of com.squareup.moshi:moshi-kotlin than 1.15.1 is available: 1.15.2
A newer version of com.google.guava:guava than 31.1-jre is available: 33.5.0-jre
For locale "es" (Spanish) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
"action_start_session_host" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"action_end_session_host" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"phrase_sent_log" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)

"share_activity_title" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_select_host_title" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_host_item_active" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_remote_path_label" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_upload_to_host" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_upload_button" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_path_required" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_preparing" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)

"share_upload_failed" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"share_no_hosts" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="share_no_hosts">No hosts configured. Add one in Sushi settings.</string>

issue.message: "share_nothing_to_share" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"gemini_transcript_label" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"gemini_transcript_you_label" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"gemini_transcript_gemini_label" is not translated in "de" (German), "fi" (Finnish), "sv" (Swedish), "es" (Spanish)
"via" is a common misspelling; did you mean "vía"?
Formatting %d followed by words ("via"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sushi_mist` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.Sushi`)
